name: Creamed Soup Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Instant nonfat dry milk powder
recipeInstructions:
- 3 cups of the mix is equivalent to nine 10 oz cans of soup.
- Combine all ingredients. Mix and store in an airtight container.
- To use, combine 1/3 cup of the mix with 1 1/4 cups of water in a saucepan.
- Cook and stir until thickened. Add 1/4 cup chopped celery or 1/4 cup chopped fresh mushrooms if desired.
- 1/3 cup of the mix contains 6 calories, 1 starch/bread exchange, 18 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams protein, trace fat, and 310 mg sodium.
